title: Community Moderation Update
body:
Today's moderation actions:

• Banned spam_wave_42 for posting phishing links across multiple channels
• Banned toxic_runner for targeted harassment of newcomers
• Warned trusted_helper to maintain professional conduct during moderation discussions
• Warned new_member_17 for off-topic posts in #introductions
• Warned bot_like_user_77 for suspicious automated-like behavior
• Dismissed false positive report against core_maintainer

We remain committed to maintaining a safe and welcoming community for all members.
